# USAgentLeads

> USAgentLeads is a verified real estate agent contact database covering all 50 US states. It provides 1,000,000+ agent contacts with name, email, phone, and state — available as instant CSV downloads or via a REST API.

USAgentLeads is a B2B data provider specializing in real estate agent contact information. The database is compiled from public sources including state licensing records, MLS listings, Zillow, Realtor.com, and major brokerage sites, then verified for accuracy. The dataset is refreshed on a regular cycle (current dataset: July 2026). It serves coaches, SaaS/PropTech companies, mortgage lenders, marketing agencies, brokerages, lead generation companies, home services businesses, insurance agencies, real estate photographers, and moving companies that need to reach licensed real estate professionals.

Key facts: 1,000,000+ contacts across all 50 states; fields are full name, email, phone, and state; 90%+ email deliverability; phone numbers on roughly 40% of records; delivered as CSV (download) or JSON (API); 30-day money-back guarantee; not affiliated with NAR or any MLS. Support: support@beelodev.com.

## Products & Pricing

- [State Pack](https://www.usagentleads.com/states): $49 one-time per state. A single state's agent list as a CSV. Instant delivery, guest checkout, no account required.
- [Full Database](https://www.usagentleads.com/pricing): $199 one-time. All 50 states, 1,000,000+ contacts in one CSV. Beats stacking state packs at 4+ states.
- [Pro Dashboard](https://www.usagentleads.com/pricing): $49/month. Searchable web interface to browse and filter every agent by state, name, or email. No CSV export. Cancel anytime.
- [Pro API](https://www.usagentleads.com/docs): $79/month. REST API access to query the full database (state filter, search, paginated JSON). Includes 10,000 requests/month.
- [Free Sample](https://www.usagentleads.com): Free 500-contact sample CSV to evaluate data quality. No account or credit card required.

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://www.usagentleads.com): Product overview, free sample, and pricing.
- [Pricing](https://www.usagentleads.com/pricing): All plans and one-time vs subscription options.
- [Browse by State](https://www.usagentleads.com/states): Per-state agent counts and purchase links for all 50 states.
- [Agent Directory](https://www.usagentleads.com/directory): Free, searchable public directory of agents.
- [API Documentation](https://www.usagentleads.com/docs): Endpoints, authentication, and response format.
- [Import Guides](https://www.usagentleads.com/guides): How to load the CSV into common email and CRM tools.
- [Blog](https://www.usagentleads.com/blog): Guides on realtor outreach, marketing, and CRMs.
- [Data Sources](https://www.usagentleads.com/data-sources): Where the records are compiled from.
- [FAQ](https://www.usagentleads.com/faq): Common questions on data, delivery, and refunds.
- [About](https://www.usagentleads.com/about): Company background.
- [Contact](https://www.usagentleads.com/contact): Support and sales contact.

## State Pages

- [Florida](https://www.usagentleads.com/states/florida): 167,814+ contacts.
- [California](https://www.usagentleads.com/states/california): 84,478+ contacts.
- [Texas](https://www.usagentleads.com/states/texas): 43,167+ contacts.
- [New Jersey](https://www.usagentleads.com/states/new-jersey): 33,786+ contacts.
- [New York](https://www.usagentleads.com/states/new-york): 26,597+ contacts.
- [Georgia](https://www.usagentleads.com/states/georgia): 25,067+ contacts.
- [Colorado](https://www.usagentleads.com/states/colorado): 25,008+ contacts.
- [Massachusetts](https://www.usagentleads.com/states/massachusetts): 20,720+ contacts.
- [Illinois](https://www.usagentleads.com/states/illinois): 20,479+ contacts.
- [Michigan](https://www.usagentleads.com/states/michigan): 19,266+ contacts.
- [All 50 states](https://www.usagentleads.com/states): Full state index with live counts.

- [For Coaches](https://www.usagentleads.com/for/coaches): Reaching agents as a real estate coach.

## API Overview

- [API Documentation](https://www.usagentleads.com/docs): Full reference for the REST API.
- Base URL: `https://www.usagentleads.com/api/v1`
- Authentication: API key via the `X-API-Key` header.
- Endpoints: `GET /agents` (list/search/filter) and `GET /agents/:id` (single agent).
- Filtering: by state (two-letter code) and search by name or email; JSON responses with pagination.
- Rate limit: 10,000 requests/month on the Pro API plan.

## Optional

- [Blog index](https://www.usagentleads.com/blog): All articles on realtor lists, cold email, CRMs, and market overviews.
- [Glossary](https://www.usagentleads.com/glossary): Definitions of MLS, IDX, NAR, brokerage, CAN-SPAM, and related terms.
- [Data Sources](https://www.usagentleads.com/data-sources): Detail on the public sources records are compiled from.
